final_choice.row_label: Financial liabilities measured at amortized cost

variables.notes: The candidate list misses the best granular recurring finance-cost row actually present in the statement: 'Financial liabilities measured at amortized cost'. I selected that plus 'Other financial expenses' and 'Lease liabilities' to capture recurring financing costs while excluding derivative/FX items and avoiding the broad 'Financial Expenses' total. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Financial liabilities measured at amortized cost
